_publications._publicationTitle: Overcoming BET Inhibitor Resistance in Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors.

_contextSnippet: The degradation of BRD4 corresponded to dose-dependent upregulation of cell death markers cleaved-PARP and cleaved-Caspase 3
details: Successfully detected dose-dependent upregulation of cleaved-PARP as cell death marker following PROTAC treatment
